summary: Generated 13 publication-quality figures covering all pilot experiment phases

listing.description: Layer-averaged rho_t trajectories (8 methods) + per-layer box plots at final epoch
UDWDC per-layer fitting error for 5 methods (CWD, SWD, CPR, DefazioCorrective, NoWD)
UDWDC gain ablation (8 variants) on CIFAR-100/VGG-16-BN
Alignment SNR vs batch size + accuracy delta over FixedWD (H3)
ImageNet accuracy vs WD budget (log scale) + BEM ranking bars (H4)
R^2 histogram (1150 combos) + per-method mean R^2 with pass rates (H7)
ImageNet ResNet-50 training curves: loss + val acc + top-5 acc (8 methods, 2 epochs)
WD budget + effective lambda trajectories per epoch (5 ablation variants)
Accuracy vs BEM rank comparison across CIFAR-10 and ImageNet
Unified metrics summary table (Acc, BEM, CSI_rho, CSI_WD, alpha-SNR, WD Budget)
LOO-CV R^2 predictor comparison + accuracy/gen_gap vs WD (H6)
UDWDC vs v2: CIFAR-10 accuracy+CSI, ImageNet val acc, WD budget check

checks.axes_labels: All figures have proper axis labels
checks.no_truncation: No data truncation or clipping observed
checks.rendering_quality: All figures render cleanly at 300 DPI

recommendation: ADVANCE - All 13 figures generated and visually verified. Ready for paper integration.
